name: testResetCurrency
description: Verify, that 'Reset filter' button change 'Currency' to default value ( ALL)
descriptionHtml: Verify, that 'Reset filter' button change 'Currency' to default value ( ALL)

steps.name: Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

testStage.description: Verify, that 'Reset filter' button change 'Currency' to default value ( ALL)

steps.name: Select currency EUR from dropdown menu
Verify: Filter displays the selected currency
Verify: Filter displays 'ALL' after applying 'Reset filter' button
